description: Novel Prep Enhanced Math II placement — full online diagnostic: 55 MCQ + 4 graphing + 10 free response from Placement_Enhanced_Math_2.tex.

brand.trust_line: Score bands follow the printed Novel Prep Enhanced Math II placement guide (55-item MC key; full paper includes graphing and free response).
brand.trust_line_zh: 分数区间与纸质《Enhanced Math II 分班测试》官方说明一致（在线为 55 道选择题；纸质卷另含作图与解答题）。

score_band_rubric.title: Below Math II readiness
score_band_rubric.headline: Build Math I mastery before Math II.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 建议先巩固 Math I，再进入 Math II。
score_band_rubric.summary: Matches the printed guide for students who need remediation on quadratics, polynomials, radicals, and core algebra before Math II.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：需在二次函数、多项式、根式与核心代数方面系统补强后再进入 Math II。
highlights: Focus on factoring, quadratic equations, and function notation.
Use Part A misses as a targeted review list.
Re-take after a focused unit to confirm growth.

score_band_rubric.title: Borderline Math II
score_band_rubric.headline: Close to Math II — targeted support recommended.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 接近 Math II 门槛，建议带支持进入或短期强化。
score_band_rubric.summary: Aligned with the borderline Math II band on the printed two-gate protocol (Gate 1).
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方 Gate 1 边缘区间一致：建议加强二次函数、根式与概率基础后再加速。
highlights: Review MC 1–28 misses, especially quadratics, radicals, and similarity.
Consider Math II with structured support rather than skipping prerequisites.
Paper graphing and free-response sections add context for final placement.

score_band_rubric.title: Math II ready
score_band_rubric.headline: Qualified for Math II; Enhanced Math II not yet secure.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 可进入 Math II；Enhanced Math II 尚需加强。
score_band_rubric.summary: Gate 1 Math II readiness is likely secure on MC items. Enhanced Math II signals (Part B) still need growth.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 选择题表现支持 Math II 起点；Enhanced 相关能力（Part B）仍需提升。
highlights: Assign Part B review: conics, statistics, advanced trigonometry.
Use the full paper test (graphing + FR) before Enhanced placement decisions.
Gate 2 on the printed key requires strong Part B plus constructed response work.

score_band_rubric.title: Borderline Enhanced Math II
score_band_rubric.headline: Near Enhanced Math II readiness — polish Part B and reasoning.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 接近 Enhanced Math II；建议强化 Part B 与说理。
score_band_rubric.summary: Matches the printed borderline Enhanced band. Student shows substantial Math II mastery with emerging Enhanced signals.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方 Enhanced 边缘区间一致：Math II 较扎实，Enhanced 信号已出现但尚需巩固。
highlights: Target Part B misses: conics, normal distributions, Law of Sines/Cosines.
Review graphing and free-response items on the paper test for Gate 2.
Discuss honors pacing with the school using this report plus class performance.

score_band_rubric.title: Enhanced Math II ready
score_band_rubric.headline: Strong Math II and Enhanced Math II readiness on this MC diagnostic.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 在本套选择题诊断上达到 Enhanced Math II 准备度。
score_band_rubric.summary: Top band on the printed MC key — strong Part A–B performance. Confirm with paper graphing/FR and Gate 2 protocol before final Enhanced Math II placement.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方 MC 最高档一致：Part A–B 表现突出；最终分班仍建议结合纸质作图/解答题与 Gate 2。
highlights: Maintain depth through mixed review and explanation-quality practice.
Use any missed items for precision tuning, not re-teaching entire units.
Coordinate with school counselors for Integrated/Enhanced track scheduling.

rubric.title: Below Math II readiness
rubric.summary: Percent fallback: focus on Math I remediation.

rubric.title: Math II ready
rubric.summary: Percent fallback: Math II track; build Enhanced signals.

rubric.title: Enhanced Math II ready
rubric.summary: Percent fallback: strong overall MC performance.
